name: Zachary Djimas
title: Principal Advisor
bio: Enterprise technology and operational resilience leader with deep experience in AI governance, workflow automation, and business continuity. Architects and delivers production-ready solutions that integrate AI into enterprise operations without sacrificing auditability or human oversight.

name: Dr. Han Brandt
title: Senior Advisor, Strategy & Architecture
bio: Enterprise architecture and AI strategy advisor with a focus on digital transformation and organizational readiness. Brings rigorous analytical frameworks to help executive teams make confident decisions about AI adoption, governance, and operating model design.
